title: The Life We Started Building
summary: Chapter 11 of The Boy Who Never Stopped Trying is titled The Life We Started Building. Theme: Realistic dreams become the dangerous ones.
sceneDescription: Chapter 11 is presented as a privacy-safe stylized memoir scene using soft watercolor memory field, drifting light, symbolic objects. The Living Scene Layer supports the memory without changing the manuscript text or recreating real people photorealistically.
